Off Calendar Feb-16-2005 Continued To Apr-08-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Feb-01-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Tony Vaughn.
L. Stephen Gizzi, Esq. for Plaintiff: John W. McWilliams.
Order waiving live testimony is in file.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Marinship Construction Services, Inc. as follows:
Damages $25,190.00
Prejudgment Interest $4,620.81
Attorney's Fees $10,000.00
Labor Code 203 $7,872.00
Costs $351.98 for a total of $48,034.79
Judgment signed in open court.

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Jan-20-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT MARINSHIP CONSTRUCTION SERVICES, INC. MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND.
APPEARANCES: Randal M. Barnum, Esq. (707) 745-3747 for plaintiff and opposing party; Raymond M. Buddie, Esq. Of Peckar & Abramson for defendant and moving party.
Ruling: Argued and the court denied the motion as the moving party did not sustain its burden. Prevailing party to prepare order to comply with CRC 391. (302/REQ/JC-EX)) REPORTER: BELDON YEE CSR #2647

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-06-2005 Continued To Feb-25-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Dec-16-2004 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Dec-16-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for a default prove-up hearing this day in Dept. 218.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerks: R. Edwards/ M. Chin, CSR: Tony Vaughn.

On the basis of evidence received, the Court advised counsel GIZZI, ESQ. that today's hearing will go off calendar due to a pending motion in Dept. 302 on 1/20/05. If said motion is denied, then counsel can thereafter calendar a default prove-up hearing in D218.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-23-2004 Continued To Jan-14-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
